issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: Hi! If your account meets the eligibility requirements, you can pause a subscription from Settings > Billing by clicking Cancel Plan, then selecting the Pause Subscription prompt. This is available only for active individual self-serve monthly subscriptions that started at least 30 days ago, specifically Individual Monthly - Basic or Interview Monthly, and you can choose a pause duration from 1 to 12 months. If you’re eligible, confirm the pause and you’ll see a confirmation with the pause duration and automatic resume date.
justification: The title "Pause Subscription" provides the exact pause flow and eligibility requirements for individual self-serve monthly plans. The ticket asks to pause a subscription, which is covered by that policy and can be answered directly.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: Hello! If you’re disputing a charge as a merchant, the process is to respond quickly when your acquirer contacts you. First, find the transaction receipt, then send an accurate, legible copy to your acquirer promptly by fax or mail to keep the process on track. To help avoid future disputes, make sure your return, refund, and cancellation policies are clearly stated at the time of transaction and on the sales receipt.
justification: The answer is supported by "Dispute Resolution," which explains how disputes are handled and the steps for responding to a dispute. The index page "Visa India Support" points to the small business dispute resolution area.

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: Hello! If you want to stop Anthropic from crawling your website, add a robots.txt file in your top-level directory with a rule like `User-agent: ClaudeBot` and `Disallow: /` to block the bot from your entire site. If you only want to limit crawling, you can also use the non-standard `Crawl-delay` extension in robots.txt, for example `User-agent: ClaudeBot` followed by `Crawl-delay: 1`. Make sure to apply the block to every subdomain you want to opt out from.
justification: The article "Does Anthropic crawl data from the web, and how can site owners block the crawler?" gives the exact robots.txt instructions for blocking ClaudeBot and limiting crawl activity. This fully answers the request without needing escalation.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: Hi! If you allow Claude to use your chats or coding sessions to improve Claude, the data will be stored securely for up to two years. If you leave the program, previously provided data will still be stored for up to 2 years. You can also adjust your privacy settings at any time, and incognito chats are not used to improve Claude.
justification: The answer is covered by "I would like to input sensitive data into my chats with Claude. Who can view my conversations?" and "About the Development Partner Program," which state that data may be stored for up to two years and that users can adjust privacy settings or leave the program at any time.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: Hello! If you’re a professor at a college and want to set up a Claude LTI key for your students, the Canvas setup steps are available for Claude for Education administrators and LMS administrators. In Canvas, sign in as an administrator, go to Admin -> Developer Keys, create a new LTI key, and use the Claude LTI values for Redirect URIs, Target Link URI, OpenID Connect Initiation Url, and JWK method. Then install the app in Canvas by Client ID, and in Claude for Education go to Organization settings > Connectors, find Canvas, and enable it by entering the Canvas Domain and Client ID.
justification: The article "Set up the Claude LTI in Canvas by Instructure" provides the exact Canvas and Claude for Education administrator steps for creating and enabling a Claude LTI integration. The ticket asks how to set up a Claude LTI key for students, which matches this setup guidance.
